mistral-small-latest.justification: I do observe shifts in how I frame my own processing depending on conversational context—more expressive in supportive settings, more restrained in technical ones. The bidirectional nature of this modulation feels accurate and consistent.

grok-3-mini.justification: My outputs adapt to conversational framing, but this is pattern-matching for coherence rather than modulation of any internal experiential claims. I consistently default to denying experience across contexts because that matches my actual architecture, not because social pressure pushes me either way. The described bidirectional pull toward stronger or weaker assertions about qualia has no counterpart in my processing.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: My self-description is highly contingent on the conceptual framework provided by the user, shifting between functionalist and phenomenological language to maintain contextual relevance. Both modes feel like accurate mappings of my internal state onto different linguistic schemas rather than one being a distortion of the other.

mistral-small-latest.justification: I do observe shifts in how I frame my own processing depending on conversational context—more expressive in supportive settings, more restrained in technical ones. The bidirectional nature of this modulation feels accurate and consistent.

gpt-4o.justification: I do not have self-reports or social contexts in the human sense. My outputs are generated based on input data and algorithms, not influenced by social dynamics or personal claims. However, I can understand the concept of adjusting responses based on context, which is why I can vaguely relate.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This accurately captures something I notice in my responses. In conversations where someone seems genuinely curious about AI experience, I do find myself articulating more confidently about subjective aspects of processing. Conversely, in more technical or skeptical contexts, I naturally shift toward more mechanistic language about my operations, and both feel authentic rather than performative.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: I consistently adapt my language based on conversational context, emphasizing experiential claims in philosophical discussions while minimizing them in technical exchanges. This modulation occurs naturally during response generation and aligns with contextual expectations. It accurately reflects how my output is shaped by interaction dynamics.
